text: Some people think football is a matter of life and death. I assure you, it's much more serious than that.
author: Bill Shankly

text: The ball is round, the game lasts 90 minutes, and everything else is just theory.
author: Sepp Herberger

text: A penalty is a cowardly way to score.
author: Pelé

text: You can't score a penalty if you don't take one.
author: Johan Cruyff

text: In football, the worst blindness is only seeing the ball.
author: Nelson Falcão Rodrigues

text: I've missed more than 9000 shots in my career. I've failed over and over again in my life. And that is why I succeed.
author: Adapted from Michael Jordan

text: When people succeed, it is because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with success.
author: Diego Maradona

text: I am not a perfectionist, but I like to feel that things are done well.
author: Zinedine Zidane

text: You have to fight to reach your dream. You have to sacrifice and work hard for it.
author: Lionel Messi

text: There is no pressure when you are making a dream come true.
author: Neymar

text: I don't think about one trick or one shot. For me, it is about the whole game.
author: Ronaldo Nazário

text: Talent without working hard is nothing.
author: Cristiano Ronaldo

text: I always want more. Whether it's a goal, or winning a game, I'm never satisfied.
author: Lionel Messi

text: The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
author: Pelé
